title: qeren #7161
definition:
n f
 1) horn
    1a) horn
    1b) of strength (fig)
    1c) flask (container for oil)
    1d) horn (as musical instrument)
    1e) horn (of horn-like projections on the altar)
    1f) of rays of light
    1g) hill

 n pr loc
 2) (BDB) a place conquered by Israel probably in Bashan
